personality_rules.rule: Al Rajhi is a mean-reversion stock
personality_rules.evidence: RSI oversold (20-30) produces +13% avg 90d return, n=119, p=0.001. Significant.
During rising rate periods: avg 90d return = -5.6%, win rate = 25%. Only 294 days but consistent.

personality_rules.rule: Stable rates are the ideal environment
personality_rules.evidence: 3,400 days with stable rates: avg 90d = +7.2%, win rate = 65%, alpha vs TASI = +4.9%
After >10% 20-day rally: avg 90d = -16.3%, win rate = 43%, n=49, p=0.003.

personality_rules.rule: Bollinger Band lower touch is a strong buy signal
Dividend announcements have no predictive edge
personality_rules.evidence: 29 events: avg 30d = +2.9%, barely above baseline. Not significant.

personality_rules.rule: Oil rising is mildly positive but not critical
personality_rules.evidence: Oil uptrend: avg 90d = +7.6%, alpha = +6% vs TASI. Correlated but not causal.

personality_rules.rule: Technical indicators are timing tools, not direction tools
personality_rules.evidence: RSI, BB signals peak at 30-60d horizons. Environment (rates, VIX) dominates at 90d.

known_weaknesses: Quarterly fundamental data pre-2022 is annual only — execution memory is partial
SAIBOR 3M not available — NIM sensitivity not directly testable
Only 16 years of data — some rate cycle combinations have small sample sizes

current_signals.note: Current signal values updated by forecasting phase
